title: Add initial draft of Podman project Governance
body:
This is the initial version of the governance model we're looking to implement. It is still very early, and comments and suggestions are very welcome!

DO NOT MERGE THIS until we have a broad agreement that the current version is acceptable.

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
If no, just write `None` in the release-note block below. If yes, a release note
is required: Enter your extended release note in the block below. If the PR
requires additional action from users switching to the new release, include the
string "action required".

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md
-->

```release-note
NONE
```

comments.body: I'm going to push another draft this afternoon which includes changes to the Community Manager role to separate it from maintainer.
Updated version pushed with community manager definition changed. I think we can probably go ahead and merge this, in a non-binding, open for changes form, early next week.
Cockpit tests failed for commit d7d744f99c9ddadd76b51a5d6d26a2a5f4cb517e. @martinpitt, @jelly, @mvollmer please check.
Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.
I'm going to drop the WIP, while we're still working on comments I think the core of the document is where we want it to be
We will merge only with an LGTM from all 6 of the Core Maintainers in the MAINTAINERS doc in this PR.
Waiting on two further LGTMs: @nalind and @baude
Applying a hold for the moment for potential edits
[NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *flouthoc*, *giuseppe*, *Luap99*, *mheon*, *nalind* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [Luap99,giuseppe,mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
